text.title: Tech Debt Basics Core Rules
text.summary: 5 hard rules for a working debt register.

rule.statement: Active register has ≤ 30 rows. Excess goes to archive / closed.

rationale.source: Internal — observed in mediamanager debt register Q4 2025

rule.rationale: A register past 30 rows becomes a graveyard nobody reads.

rule.statement: Every row carries one of: deliberate-reckless / deliberate-prudent / inadvertent-reckless / inadvertent-prudent.
rule.rationale: Quadrant determines the action: reckless → refactor; prudent → monitor.

rule.statement: Every row links to evidence: PR, postmortem, perf chart, or bug ticket.
rule.rationale: Without evidence, the row is opinion; opinions accumulate and dilute the register.

rule.statement: Register is reviewed monthly; items past 90 days with no action are escalated or closed.
rule.rationale: Stale rows hide active rows; the review keeps the cap working.

rule.statement: Agents may scan and propose candidates; humans approve before adding to the register.
rule.rationale: Agents over-flag; human approval keeps signal-to-noise high.
